title: Roasted Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional Algerian dish featuring lamb marinated in a mixture of miso and spices, roasted to perfection in a ti-leaf wrap, perfect for a brunch gathering
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the lamb shoulder to the bowl and coat with the miso mixture, making sure to cover all surfaces.
Drizzle the olive oil over the lamb and massage it into the meat.
Wrap the lamb in ti leaves, making sure to seal the edges securely.
Place the wrapped lamb on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes per pound, or until the internal temperature reaches 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve the lamb with the roasted ti leaves and any accumulated juices.
